name: Avga Matia Me Saltsa Domatas (Fried Eggs W/
recipeInstructions:
1. Drop the tomatoes into boiling water for 2 minutes, then carefully peel off the skins.
2. Remove the seeds and soft insides, and cut into small pieces.
3. Place the pieces in a frying pan with a little salt. Cook over low heat until they are softened.
4. Mash the tomatoes into a pulp using a potato masher or fork.
5. Add butter to the mashed tomatoes and cook until it begins to brown slightly.
6. While the tomatoes are browning, crack the eggs into a shallow dish. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Gently place the eggs into the pan with the tomato sauce.
8. Cook the eggs to your desired doneness.
9. Serve immediately with the tomato sauce and garnish with chopped parsley.
10. Serve with fried potatoes.
